criteriaLabelsById.metrics-feedback-available: Insights from metrics and feedback are available to optimize existing APIs.
criteriaLabelsById.api-opportunity-documented: Individual API opportunities are identified and documented.
criteriaLabelsById.api-reusability: The API meets a clear business need and is reusable for multiple API consumers.
criteriaLabelsById.hide-backend-discrepancies: The goal of the API is to hide backend data models and discrepancies.
criteriaLabelsById.value-prop-validated: The value proposition validates with key stakeholders.
criteriaLabelsById.consumer-segments-identified: API consumer segments (internal and external) are identified.
criteriaLabelsById.api-roadmap-defined: High-level roadmaps for API development are established.
criteriaLabelsById.architecture-patterns-validated: The API architecture uses patterns that promote reusability and integration, and is validated with stakeholders.
criteriaLabelsById.design-reflects-business-value: The API's design and endpoints have a clear connection to their business value and features.
criteriaLabelsById.api-consistency: API has a consistent design with our other API products.
criteriaLabelsById.api-contract-tested: The API contract is tested and meets functional and non-functional requirements.
criteriaLabelsById.api-description-available: The API and its endpoints have descriptions that explain their business value and features.
criteriaLabelsById.audit-passed: The API passes compliance, security, and audit checks.
criteriaLabelsById.audit-reports-shared: Audit reports are shared with stakeholders.
criteriaLabelsById.api-ready-for-publishing: The API is ready to be published to the appropriate gateways and environments to support reusability for multiple API consumers.
criteriaLabelsById.api-documentation-ready: API documentation is complete and ready for publishing.
criteriaLabelsById.consumer-support-ready: API registration, support, and communication processes are in place.
criteriaLabelsById.legal-compliance-clear: Legal and compliance requirements are precise enough for publishing.

api-community-engagement-strategies.title: API Community Engagement Strategies
api-community-engagement-strategies.description: A playbook for fostering API adoption by cultivating communities through content, support channels, feedback loops, and social engagement strategies.

api-compliance-best-practices.title: API Compliance Best Practices
api-compliance-best-practices.description: Ensure APIs meet legal, regulatory, and internal compliance through documentation, controls, and automated validations.

api-development-best-practices.title: API Development Best Practices
api-development-best-practices.description: Implementation guidance for turning a validated API contract into a consistent, maintainable API codebase using standard libraries, reusable patterns, and aligned development workflows.

api-metrics-and-analytics.title: API Metrics And Analytics
api-metrics-and-analytics.description: A resource for defining, collecting, and analyzing API performance and usage data to align technical KPIs with business outcomes.

api-onboarding-best-practices.title: API Onboarding Best Practices
api-onboarding-best-practices.description: Best practices to streamline API consumer onboarding journeys with step-by-step registration, discovery, and first-call guidance.

api-portfolio-management-guidelines.title: API Portfolio Management Guidelines
api-portfolio-management-guidelines.description: A guide to strategically manage an organization's API suite—prioritizing APIs, allocating resources, and monitoring performance across lifecycles.

api-security-best-practices.title: API Security Best Practices
api-security-best-practices.description: A set of actionable controls for securing APIs, including authentication, authorization, encryption, rate-limiting, and pipeline-level compliance checks.

api-team-structure-guidelines.title: API Team Structure Guidelines
api-team-structure-guidelines.description: Organizational guidance for defining roles and responsibilities within API teams to ensure clarity, collaboration, and accountability.

api-testing-best-practices.title: API Testing Best Practices
api-testing-best-practices.description: Guidelines for implementing automated functional, performance, and security testing throughout the API lifecycle.

api-training-programs.title: API Training Programs
api-training-programs.description: A roadmap for upskilling teams with structured learning paths in API design, governance, performance, and security.

api-versioning-best-practices.title: API Versioning Best Practices
api-versioning-best-practices.description: Strategies for introducing, maintaining, and retiring API versions while preserving backward compatibility and consumer trust.

apiops-CI-CD-for-apis.title: APIOps CI/CD For APIs
apiops-CI-CD-for-apis.description: Deployment guidance that integrates API lifecycle tasks—design, testing, governance—into continuous integration and delivery pipelines.

competitor-analysis-template.title: Competitor Analysis Template
competitor-analysis-template.description: A structured worksheet to benchmark your API offerings against competitors by mapping strengths, weaknesses, and value differentiators.

contract-first-design.title: Contract First Design
contract-first-design.description: A guideline advocating for API-first approaches using formal contracts (e.g., OpenAPI) to align stakeholders before development.

cross-functional-collaboration-best-prac.title: Cross Functional Collaboration Best Practices
cross-functional-collaboration-best-prac.description: Practices to facilitate communication and alignment between business and tech teams when planning or delivering APIs.

data-privacy-guidelines.title: Data Privacy Guidelines
data-privacy-guidelines.description: Design considerations to ensure APIs meet data protection regulations like GDPR through anonymization and access controls.

domain-canvas.title: Domain Canvas
domain-canvas.description: A modeling tool to define and communicate the key entities and relationships in your domain, ensuring semantic consistency across APIs.

ecosystem-vision-template.title: Ecosystem Vision Template
ecosystem-vision-template.description: A strategic planning tool to define the API ecosystem, including target partners, value chains, and integration opportunities.

industry-standards-and-best-practices.title: Industry Standards And Best Practices
industry-standards-and-best-practices.description: A reference resource for aligning API design and operation with widely recognized industry frameworks and specifications.

partner-integration-guidelines.title: Partner Integration Guidelines
partner-integration-guidelines.description: Integration checklists and communication patterns to manage technical and legal aspects of third-party API relationships.

role-communication-best-practices.title: Role Communication Best Practices
role-communication-best-practices.description: Tools to define and document who is responsible for what within API initiatives, ensuring handoffs and accountability are clear.

scalable-infrastructure-best-practices.title: Scalable Infrastructure Best Practices
scalable-infrastructure-best-practices.description: Architectural guidance to ensure APIs are deployed on infrastructure that can elastically handle usage spikes and growth.

service-agreement-template.title: Service Agreement Template
service-agreement-template.description: A customizable agreement format that defines expectations, SLAs, responsibilities, and access terms for API consumption.

stakeholder-engagement-best-practices.title: Stakeholder Engagement Best Practices
stakeholder-engagement-best-practices.description: Engagement tactics for aligning internal and external stakeholders around shared API goals, value, and governance.

test-automation-frameworks.title: Test Automation Frameworks
test-automation-frameworks.description: Recommended tools and patterns for automating API contract, regression, and integration testing across environments.

vendor-management-best-practices.title: Vendor Management Best Practices
vendor-management-best-practices.description: Framework for evaluating and managing external API vendors and third-party integrations based on risk, performance, and compliance.

api-audit-checklist.title: API Audit Checklist
api-audit-checklist.description: A comprehensive checklist to verify API readiness before publishing, covering design, documentation, security, and policy compliance.

api-business-model-canvas.title: API Business Model Canvas
api-business-model-canvas.description: Strategically assess API business viability by mapping value propositions, consumer segments, and key resources.

api-design-principles.title: API Design Principles
api-design-principles.description: A concise guide to API usability, discoverability, and consistency grounded in proven design philosophies and user needs.

api-value-proposition-canvas.title: API Value Proposition Canvas
api-value-proposition-canvas.description: Align API features with user needs by mapping tasks, pains, and gains to API products.

business-impact-canvas.title: Business Impact Canvas
business-impact-canvas.description: Design a scalable and secure API platform architecture that meets business and technical requirements.

capacity-canvas.title: Capacity Canvas
capacity-canvas.description: Plan API capacity to meet current and future business demands, ensuring scalability and performance.

customer-journey-canvas.title: Customer Journey Canvas
customer-journey-canvas.description: Map customer journeys to identify needs and pain points, enhancing API design and user experience.

event-canvas.title: Event Canvas
event-canvas.description: Design event-driven APIs by defining events, triggers, and processing logic.

graphql-canvas.title: GraphQL Canvas
graphql-canvas.description: Design GraphQL APIs by defining types, queries, mutations, and subscriptions.

interaction-canvas.title: Interaction Canvas
interaction-canvas.description: Define API interactions, workflows, and expected responses to ensure a consistent API consumer experience.

location-canvas.title: Location Canvas
location-canvas.description: Map API provider and consumer locations to ensure compliance and performance across regions.

rest-canvas.title: REST Canvas
rest-canvas.description: Design APIs using RESTful principles, defining resources, verbs, and example requests and responses.
